hero.title: Programmes
hero.subtitle: KSSR national curriculum, enrichment, and beyond — a complete education ecosystem.

primary.label: Primary School
primary.title: KSSR National Curriculum
primary.description: Edusky follows the Kurikulum Standard Sekolah Rendah (KSSR) — Malaysia's national primary school curriculum, approved by the Ministry of Education. Our SMIPS registration code is JDA1001. Medium of instruction: Bahasa Malaysia with English.

enrichment.label: Enrichment
enrichment.title: After-School & Holiday Programmes
enrichment.description: Open to Edusky students and the wider community. All programmes run on-site at our Taman Adda Height campus.

camps.name: Young Leaders Camp
camps.description: Public speaking, team challenges, community service project, certificate ceremony. School holidays.

camps.name: Creative Arts Week
camps.description: Drawing, drama, music, final showcase performance. Open to ages 7–14.
